steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: The claim emphasizes that Mrs. Sommers's shift in self-perception is caused by the clothing. We need a quote where the clothing directly produces an internal change.

steps.title: Match the causal link to the evidence
steps.content:
Choice D directly ties the clothing (stockings, boots, gloves) to an internal shift: “had worked marvels in her bearing—had given her a feeling of assurance, a sense of belonging.” The other three either capture her pre-transformation mindset, show mere physical admiration, or focus on her family.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
